actions: Provider flagged as HIGH RISK and deprioritized in matching

stages.reasoning_trace: Serious issue detected. Provider flagged, booking funds frozen. Escalated to human support. | Provider cancellation rate updated to 0.52. | WARNING: Cancellation rate > 20%. Provider flagged as HIGH RISK and deprioritized in matching.

side_effects: Provider risk_score updated to 'high' in Firestore
Provider deprioritized in future matchmaking queries
Booking funds frozen pending human review
